_comment: Example witness input for portfolio_threshold.circom. All monetary values are scaled integers (multiply by 1e6 to avoid floats in-circuit). ownerAddress is the prover's Stellar account ID reduced to a 128-bit integer (e.g. first 16 bytes of the raw public key, big-endian). ownerCommit/threshold/minAssets are PUBLIC — every other field is PRIVATE and never leaves the prover's machine.
